title: hieracium glaucinum subsp. ovalifolium
intro: Hieracium glaucinum subsp. ovalifolium, also known as hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Hieracium glaucinum subsp. ovalifolium can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
